understanding.goal_understanding: Complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces to push blocks onto goal tiles marked '+', or meeting the engine's WIN condition, progressing through levels until the entire run wins while staying under per-level step budgets.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece (P) by one cell (3 pixels) and can push adjacent pushable objects (like B) if unblocked; walls (#) and other obstacles block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S) at exact pixel coordinates [x,y]; heuristics like movement.blocked provide hints but actions must be tested; multiple selectables require switching to solve puzzles.
